title: Detailed
description: This adds a ton of tweaks and vanilla friendly texture overhauls.
body:
Detailed is a Vanilla Tweaks-esque pack I've been working on for a few years now. This adds alot of features I've been wanting to see or haven't been done in a way I liked. With use of CTM I've tried to get each biome and area of the game to feel more "detailed" without feeling cluttered. I've added 3d grass, made it where stone gradually gets darker the deeper you go to blend in better with deepslate, Overhauled netherrack to give each biome it's own feel, Tweaked end pillars and portals to fit their enviroments better, Added a bunch of biome specific blocks, custom block models and more.

Support for Visuality, Cobblemon, Copper Fire and Incendium included.
I've also Uploaded stand-alone versions for those who don't like certain features.
